privileged_info_summary: The task operates on four MedinTux test databases (DrTuxTest, MedicaTuxTest, CIM10Test, CCAMTest) that are initialized from official SQL dumps bundled with the MedinTux installer, supplemented with synthetic test patient data (15 hardcoded French names with fake SSNs and addresses inserted via setup_medintux.sh lines 315-334). All data is synthetic/test data, not real patient information. Database backups are created in /home/ga/MedinTux_Backups/ and verified through comparison of table counts and row counts between original and restored databases.
